hero.subtitle: CLEAN CODE.
hero.description: Developing Full Stack solutions with the precision of an expert barista. Pure performance, no dirty code.

education.degree: Associate Degree in Systems Analysis and Development

constants.summary: Web Developer focused on performance and scalability. Practical experience building modern applications using the JavaScript ecosystem (React, Node.js) and TypeScript. Passionate about clean code and efficient software architecture.

brand-criativo.title: Brand Criativo - Identity & Web (In Progress)
brand-criativo.description: Development of Brand Criativo's new digital home. The goal was to break away from standard minimalism and create a memorable experience that screams 'authority'. I used a brutalist approach with heavy typography and high contrast for attention retention. The site is not just a portfolio, it's a conversion tool with information architecture focused on turning visitors into qualified leads.

nutri-jamilly.title: Dr. Jamilly Mayane
nutri-jamilly.description: Institutional site focused on SEO and conversion for a clinical nutritionist. High-performance responsive design with a user-friendly interface for online consultation scheduling.

emanuel-silvestre.title: Emanuel Silvestre Law Firm
emanuel-silvestre.description: Strategic Landing Page for acquiring social security clients. Direct WhatsApp integration and mobile optimization.

ian-granja.title: Ian Granja Law Firm
ian-granja.description: High-performance institutional site focused on local SEO and lead conversion. Optimized design to convey authority and trust.

domino.title: Multiplayer Domino
domino.description: Real-time game application using WebSockets for low-latency bidirectional communication.

asset-maintenance.title: Asset Management
asset-maintenance.description: Fullstack system for preventive equipment maintenance control. Administrative dashboard and reports.

dashboard-ml-previsao.title: Player Analysis and Prediction Dashboard
dashboard-ml-previsao.description: Complete Machine Learning solution integrating FastAPI backend and React + Plotly frontend. Allows spreadsheet upload and interactive visualizations of performance predictions.

contact.title: INITIATE PROJECT.
contact.description: Have a technical challenge or need to scale your operation? Let's compile a robust solution. No small talk, straight to the code.

project_details.dev_desc: The development prioritized delivering a fluid experience, using modern design patterns and a robust architecture.
